insight: Do Not Give Every Wound the Same Question
publicTitle: Ask What the Wound Can Bear
plainSummary: A deep question helps only when it fits the path, the support, and the person’s wound.
atAGlance: Some questions heal one person and burden another. A teaching about the self must fit the path that carries it. It also needs steady help and a clear view of the pain a person brings.
keyPoints: Meaning depends on the person, not only on the depth of the words.
A tired mind can turn even wisdom into another demand.
Test whether the question brings care, honesty, and steadier living.
